历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 17406 → 17530 → 31353 → 34550 → 31969, showing a clear trend of moving backward. The significant jump in rankings starting in 2023 is related to the merger of batches in Guangxi's new college entrance examination. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 31969, slightly recovering from 2024. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangxi was 36 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 43 in 2024, and 46 in 2025, showing continuous expansion. The 2026 plan is 42, a decrease of 4 from 2025 (a reduction of about 8.7%), and the tightening of enrollment quotas has a certain impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guizhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has steadily risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to inappropriate conditions set in recruitment announcements causing public opinion backlash; the university has terminated the recruitment and apologized. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 76th (rated as average), with short video exposure at a medium level, showing no obvious signal of application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Plant Production category (Agronomy, Horticulture, Plant Protection, etc.) under Physics Category, attracting some candidates interested in agriculture and forestry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors under Physics Category such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, with sustained high social attention. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Guangxi in 2026 is about 269,000, an increase of about 3.3% from 2025, intensifying competition. Guizhou University is located in neighboring Guizhou Province, geographically close to Guangxi with convenient transportation, providing a natural geographical advantage for Guangxi candidates. The university's enrollment in Guangxi accounts for about 2%-3% of its total national enrollment, which is at a medium-to-low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 31969, the 8.7% reduction in Physics Category enrollment plan for 2026 (which, based on supply-demand elasticity, would move the ranking forward to about 30302), the approximately 3.3% increase in Guangxi Physics Category candidates (intensifying competition and moving the ranking backward), and the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness and moving the ranking forward), after weighing these factors, the predicted lowest admission ranking for 2026 is about 30502, with a range of 30002–31002.

If your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (around 31000), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 2 majors and ensure Tier 3 majors as a backup.
